name: COP EER Calculator
seo_description: Use our free cop and eer calculator to quickly estimate cop, eer based on power_util_kw, power_elec_kw. Not registration needed.
example_label: Calculate COP from 3.5 kW heat, 1 kW input.

range_hints.potencia_util_kw: Thermal output delivered. Residential split: 2-5 kW, Commercial: 10-50 kW
range_hints.potencia_elec_kw: Measured power draw. Efficient units consume 3-5 times less than thermal output delivered

result_context: COP: {cop}. EER: {eer}. Clase energética: {clase_eficiencia}. Ahorro of the {ahorro_vs_strength_pct}% vs resistance electrical.
formula_display: COP = Q_útil(kW) ÷ P_eléctrica(kW) | EER = Q_frío(BTU/h) ÷ P_eléctrica(W)
mistakes: Confusing COP with EER — the COP is to modo heat and the EER to modo cooling
Use data of catalog without Verify condition is of test — the efficiency current can ser lower
Ignorar the COP seasonal (SCOP) — the nominal is a carga maximum, the SCOP refleja the efficiency annual
